nodes.name: Webhook: Upload Files3
nodes.notes: Accepts multipart/form-data POST with fields: table_a (file), table_b (file), definition_mode (string: AI or Manual), standard_flow (string, optional), critical_steps (string, optional)

messages.content:
=You are an SAP Procure-to-Pay (P2P) process mining expert.

Activities observed in this event log (sorted by frequency):
{{ $json.activities.join(", ") }}

Total orders: {{ $json.total_orders }}

NOTE: Many orders in SAP are incomplete stubs (only creation was logged). 
Define the IDEAL standard P2P flow that COMPLETE orders should follow.

A standard SAP P2P process typically includes:
1. Create Purchase Order Item (mandatory)
2. Send Purchase Order (mandatory)  
3. Record Goods Receipt OR Record Service Entry Sheet (mandatory)
4. Record Invoice Receipt (mandatory)
5. Clear Invoice (mandatory)

Use ONLY activity names from the list above. Do not invent names.

Return JSON ONLY:
{
  "standard_flow": ["step1", "step2", "step3", "step4", "step5"],
  "critical_steps": ["step that is absolutely mandatory - must be present in every complete order"]
}

Critical steps = steps whose absence means the order is non-compliant.
Choose 2-3 activities that represent mandatory milestones.

parameters.subject: 🚨 Critical Process Deviation Detected
parameters.html:
=
OFI Services · PAM System
Procurement Process Alert
Action Required

A blocked process deviation has been flagged on purchase order {{$json.Order_Number}} during automated compliance monitoring. The order cannot proceed until this is reviewed.

Detected: {{$json.Order_Date || 'See system log'}}  ·  Risk tier: {{$json.Risk_Level}}  ·  Risk score: {{$json.Risk_Score}}

Order Snapshot
Order Number {{$json.Order_Number}}
Process Status {{$json.Process_Status}}
Step Where Blocked {{$json.Block_Step}}
Total Deviations {{$json.Deviation_Count}} detected
What Was Detected
Block Reason
{{$json.Block_Reason}}
Deviation types flagged: {{$json.Deviation_Types}}
AI Analysis Summary
Root Cause {{$json.root_cause || '—'}}
Business Risk {{$json.business_risk || '—'}}
Recommendation {{$json.recommendation || '—'}}
Process Trail (Actual Steps Recorded)
{{ ($json.Actual_Flow || []).join(' → ') }}

Please review this order at your earliest convenience and take corrective action where required.

Regards,

Process Adherence Monitoring

Automated Compliance Intelligence · OFI Services

This message was generated automatically. Do not reply to this email.  ·  OFI Services Internal Use Only
